form.formComment: At debut, 10th of 12 at Fairyhouse on April 6 over 3218m, 60 len behind Charismatic Kid with 70kg at $21. Others look better prospects.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-9). At debut, 10th of 12 at Fairyhouse on April 6 over 3218m, 60 len behind Charismatic Kid with 70kg at $21. Others look better prospects.

form.formComment: Was as a despised roughie at debut, second last of 16 at Cork on April 5 over 3822m, 160 len behind Barnahash Prince with 73kg at $151. Hard to see him featuring.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-7). Was as a despised roughie at debut, second last of 16 at Cork on April 5 over 3822m, 160 len behind Barnahash Prince with 73kg at $151. Hard to see him featuring.

form.formComment: At debut, 3rd of 9 at Gowran Park on March 7 over 3621m, on heavy track; 26 len behind Dromard with 73kg at $19. Better for that experience and likely to be highly competitive again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-5.5). At debut, 3rd of 9 at Gowran Park on March 7 over 3621m, on heavy track; 26 len behind Dromard with 73kg at $19. Better for that experience and likely to be highly competitive again.

form.formComment: Was at a huge quote at debut, ran last in a small field at Punchestown on February 15 over 3218m, in the wet; 33 len behind Soul Asylum carrying 73kg at $67. Don't think he will trouble this field.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-12). Was at a huge quote at debut, ran last in a small field at Punchestown on February 15 over 3218m, in the wet; 33 len behind Soul Asylum carrying 73kg at $67. Don't think he will trouble this field.

form.formComment: Resumes. Finished off last preparation second of 9 at Leopardstown December 27 over 4023m, 1.75 len behind Barnahash Mason with 73kg at $51. First up last campaign fifth of 11 at Fairyhouse November 29 over 3218m, 32 len behind Keep Him Company with 73kg at $126. Expected to prove hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-3). Resumes. Finished off last preparation second of 9 at Leopardstown December 27 over 4023m, 1.75 len behind Barnahash Mason with 73kg at $51. First up last campaign fifth of 11 at Fairyhouse November 29 over 3218m, 32 len behind Keep Him Company with 73kg at $126. Expected to prove hard to beat.

form.formComment: Five-year-old gelding by Court Cave out of Kala Miller who has taken a long time to make it to the track. Likely to be better for this run.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Five-year-old gelding by Court Cave out of Kala Miller who has taken a long time to make it to the track. Likely to be better for this run.

form.formComment: Five-year-old gelding by Maxios out of Game Of Legs who has taken a long time to make it to the track. Will pay to watch for a betting push.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Five-year-old gelding by Maxios out of Game Of Legs who has taken a long time to make it to the track. Will pay to watch for a betting push.

form.formComment: Resuming. Finished off last campaign eighth of 11 at Fairyhouse November 29 over 3218m, 47 len behind Keep Him Company carrying 74kg at $81. First up last campaign eighth of 10 at Navan November 17 over 3218m, 15 len behind Oh My Word with 74kg at $101. Hard to enthuse.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Resuming. Finished off last campaign eighth of 11 at Fairyhouse November 29 over 3218m, 47 len behind Keep Him Company carrying 74kg at $81. First up last campaign eighth of 10 at Navan November 17 over 3218m, 15 len behind Oh My Word with 74kg at $101. Hard to enthuse.

form.formComment: Resumes from a spell after only one run when 2nd of 9 at Ballindenisk P2p on November 30 over 4828m, slow going head behind Dancing Soldier carrying 60kg. Rates strongly and looks tough to stop again.
